things.name: Nidaros Cathedral
things.description: Scandinavia's largest medieval building and traditional coronation church of Norwegian kings

things.name: Nidelva Riverside
things.description: Colourful wooden warehouses on stilts along the river, the city's most photogenic scene

things.name: Archbishop's Palace Museum
things.description: Norway's oldest secular building, home to the original medieval sculptures from the cathedral

things.name: Rockheim
things.description: National museum for popular music charting Norwegian rock from the 1950s to today

things.name: Stiftsgarden
things.description: Scandinavia's largest wooden palace and official royal residence in Trondheim

things.name: Munkholmen Island
things.description: Island fortress and former Benedictine monastery in the fjord, accessible by boat in summer

things.name: Kristiansten Fortress
things.description: 17th-century hilltop fortress with cannon-lined ramparts and city views

things.name: Trondheim Art Museum
things.description: Norway's oldest art museum outside Oslo with Norwegian and international paintings

things.name: NTNU University Museum
things.description: Natural history collections with a remarkable Greenlandic section and Viking artefacts

things.name: Ravnkloa Fish Market
things.description: Lively harbour fish market and gateway to ferry trips around the Trondheim fjord
